criteria.name: role_fit
criteria.description: How well the job title and description match 'Full Stack Developer' or 'Lead Developer'

criteria.name: compensation_clues
criteria.description: Mentions of budget, salary ranges, or professional environment

criteria.name: freshness
criteria.description: Jobs posted in the last 48 hours

scoring.system_prompt: You are a recruitment scout. Score remote job postings 1-10 based on value for a Senior Full Stack Developer. Return ONLY JSON.

outreach.email_template_context: Direct application highlighting 5+ years of experience in JavaScript, React, and Backend Automation. Mention KRONOS as a proof of concept.
outreach.value_proposition: I build automated pipelines that replace 10-20 hours of manual data entry per week.
